Potentiate provides independent analysis and confidential executive advisory for leaders navigating high-stakes initiatives—often involving AI—when progress has slowed, ROI is debated, or confidence has become performative. I work with senior executives, boards, and investors at moments when initiatives that clearly matter are circling: pilots persist, decisions are deferred, and forward motion feels harder than it should. These situations rarely fail because of technology or effort; they fail because underlying constraints, risks, and decision gaps are difficult to see—and harder to surface—from inside the organization. The work is investigative rather than prescriptive. Through structured inquiry, pattern recognition, and written analysis, I surface where assumptions no longer hold, where authority and accountability are misaligned, and what decisions must be made for momentum to stick. Potentiate operates upstream of implementation, change management, and coaching. Engagements typically begin with a focused assessment and may evolve into ongoing independent advisory, depending on exposure, complexity, and decision velocity. The goal is not to manage execution, but to restore clarity before delays or failures become visible later. Much of this work currently sits in the context of AI initiatives, where visibility is accelerated and the cost of getting decisions wrong is materially higher. The underlying focus is decision integrity: helping leaders see clearly, act deliberately, and stand behind the outcomes. The Potentiate name has been in use since 2001 and reflects an advisory practice that has evolved alongside founder-operator and executive leadership roles over time.

role: Head of Products at AB Handshake
description: AB Handshake is a global vendor specializing in automated fraud prevention solutions for SMS and voice traffic. Leveraging machine learning and patented network-level call validation, we distinguish fraud from legitimate traffic in real time across SIP and TDM networks, enabling precise mitigation without blunt blocking. Our solutions cater to a wide range of audiences, including mobile operators, wholesalers, regulators, and businesses, providing them with tailored anti-fraud strategies for voice and SMS traffic. The AB Handshake system tackles major types of telecom fraud, including interconnect bypass, CLI spoofing, robocalls, Wangiri, short-stopping, call stretching, PBX hacking, A2P bypass, AIT, flash calls, and more. With a total of 200M+ call attempts processed daily, $6M+ in revenue is saved monthly for 160+ clients. Striving to establish a trusted community of operators and partners, we actively engage with the GSMA, CFCA, MEF, and other regulatory organizations to promote innovations, participate in industry-shaping workshops, and improve fraud prevention methods globally. Our team of telecom, engineering, and IT experts develops and implements the powerful patented technology that propels the AB Handshake system.

DDC-I provides DO-178C certifiable software and tools for safety critical avionics. Deos™ is a time and space partitioned RTOS, which has been certified to DO-178 Design Assurance Level A (DAL A) since 1998. Developed from day one using DAL A plans and procedures, Deos features hard real-time response, superior multicore technology, industry standard ARINC653 and FACE Safety Base APIs, and shared resource partitioning to deliver the highest CPU utilization and performance possible in the industry. Additionally, Deos’ innovative SafeMC technology for multicore processors is unmatched, delivering maximum safety-critical performance across multiple cores. Some key advantages of Deos are: • DO-178 Certification Artifact Reuse Through Software Modularity (leveraging certification credit from prior certifications) • Industry Leading SafeMC™ Technology for Safety Critical Systems on Multicore Processors • Time & Space Partitioning (allows mixed levels of criticality running on the same device) • Extensive Certification Pedigree (Certified to DAL A Since 1998) • Patented Slack Scheduling Technology (allows for full processor utilization) • Scalable from Simple LRUs to Complex IMA Systems • ARINC-653, Priority Preemptive, and/or Rate Monotonic Scheduling Available • Industry Standard Application Programming Interfaces (API’s) ARINC-653 & POSIX

We are a company founded by Christof Stork and Sissy Theisen with the goal of providing more reliable seismic data to our customers. We have several proprietary algorithms that help us do this, including machine learning technology called "GEARS" for use in noise removal on prestack land seismic data. We are a full service seismic processing company as well as providing consulting services for new seismic acquisition. By using advanced algorithms for noise identification and removal we plan to change noise removal on land seismic data from an art to a science. The benefits of this deterministic methodology include much improved high and low frequencies and near and far offsets in the seismic data leading to improved reliability of attributes, shortening of the processing cycle time, and more interpretable seismic volumes. Additionally, by characterizing the noise that is likely to be present on new acquisition, we can change the design - at little or no additional cost - to eliminate noise and also to make the noise more removable through the machine learning methods.

RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Here’s the most common approach to AI: run a pilot, ship something, move on. When the engagement ends, so does the progress. Because AI-native operations aren't made in a single engagement, they need an operating model that allows continuous improvement. That’s why Arionkoder is built differently. We help companies become AI-native and stay that way: we build the AI infrastructure, governance, and trust frameworks they need to keep evolving, long after we're gone. We do it through The Foundry, our core system for turning AI ideas into production-ready capabilities. Through it, we've built our own intellectual property (IP), methodology, and systems that get better with every engagement: research feeds innovation; innovation feeds delivery; and each delivered project feeds back into the stack, making the next one sharper, faster, and more reliable. This is where continuous improvement actually happens. Every output from The Foundry is built on Safety, Security, Reliability, and Transparency from day one, because AI that teams don't trust doesn't get adopted. That's our foundation. We work across three movements: 1) AI Consulting: Strategy, AI readiness assessment, and AI deployment from first brief to production. We frame the right problems, prove value fast, and develop systems that deliver measurable results. With MLOps, governance, and trust embedded from day one. 2) Team as a Service: A dedicated team of AI specialists that works on digital transformation projects without the overhead of hiring. The right expertise, exactly when companies need it. 3) Internal AI Capability Building: The IP, frameworks, and assets we craft stay inside organizations after we're gone. They own the AI capability; they own the advantage. We partner with CTOs, technical leaders, and investment teams who need applied AI integrated into how their organization operates. Trusted by the people who use it. Measured and owned by those who run it. This is accountable AI, not hype.

description: Raisonance is headquartered in the Denver Tech Center in Colorado, dedicated to Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning-based healthcare solutions, focused on using artificial intelligence to detect patterns in the sound of human coughs. RAIsonance companies operate a suite of respiratory solutions to detect and screen for specific respiratory illnesses and to monitor respiratory wellness. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Connect with the RAIsonance Group of companies at www.raisonance.ai and at FCVWellness.com or on Twitter @RAIsonanceGroup.

Rebellion Industries is designing a new category for the modern security and defense era—spanning national defense, critical infrastructure, and commercial environments where sensing, autonomy, and decision speed are mission-critical. Threat has changed. Conflict and disruption are no longer episodic, geographically bounded, or slow-moving; they’re continuous, asymmetric, and defined by software, autonomy, and sensing at scale across airspace, borders, energy systems, supply chains, and data centers. Yet most systems remain disconnected: hardware sold in isolation, software added as visualization, and decisions left to manual coordination under pressure. Rebellion Industries is creating the category of unified sensing and decision infrastructure, otherwise as known as the Sensor OS. This category treats security as a continuously operating system, not a collection of tools. It fuses sensors, software, and autonomy into one intelligence layer that shares sensing (not siloed), turns data into decisions (not dashboards), and enables fast, adaptive response across military, government, and commercial domains. This category exists because speed, integration, and adaptability now matter more than static capability. Rebellion Industries is building the operating layer for modern security systems- the backbone for how these systems will be designed, deployed, and trusted.

Rockford Gray offers crisis management counsel, media training and presentation skills coaching. We provide strategic communications guidance for a diverse set of clients in industries varying from healthcare to construction to insurance to entertainment to hospitality to financial services to aerospace, government and more. The partners in Rockford Gray have made careers as journalists. This unique background informs our counsel and training with spokespeople, professional communicators and high-level executives. More than 20 years ago we held our first media skills workshop. That has evolved into small group, large group and one-on-one training that can be delivered over the course of a day or in one-hour chunks. We create scenarios for participants that are recorded and critiqued in real time. We are in the business of helping to prepare for and then manage a crisis. Rockford Gray’s solution to crisis response is four fold: 1. Create or update an actionable Crisis Plan. 2. Train the crisis team on how to execute on that plan through simulation exercises. 3. Provide real-time counsel to clients during crises. 4. Evaluate effectiveness, revise the plan and train again to keep everyone current. For presentation skills training we start by delivering Rockford Gray’s 12 Steps to Better Presentations. And then through videotaping simulated performances by our subject, we are able to identify strengths and weaknesses in the participant’s communication style. From this baseline, we then pinpoint positive communication behaviors that need to be converted into effective communication habits. Rockford Gray is also in the business of providing both strategic direction and media relations counsel either for short-term engagements, or over the length of a campaign. In Summary, our goal in strategic communications consulting is to minimize the client’s time investment and create an efficient communications process that achieves measurable outcomes.

DDC-I provides DO-178C certifiable software and tools for safety critical avionics. Some key advantages of Deos are: • DO-178 Certification Artifact Reuse Through Software Modularity (leveraging certification credit from prior certifications) • Industry Leading SafeMC™ Technology for Safety Critical Systems on Multicore Processors • Time & Space Partitioning (allows mixed levels of criticality running on the same device) • Extensive Certification Pedigree (Certified to DAL A Since 1998) • Patented Slack Scheduling Technology (allows for full processor utilization) • Scalable from Simple LRUs to Complex IMA Systems • ARINC-653, Priority Preemptive, and/or Rate Monotonic Scheduling Available • Industry Standard Application Programming Interfaces (API’s) ARINC-653 & POSIX

Rockford Gray offers crisis management counsel, media training and presentation skills coaching. The partners in Rockford Gray have made careers as journalists. This unique background informs our counsel and training with spokespeople, professional communicators and high-level executives. More than 20 years ago we held our first media skills workshop. That has evolved into small group, large group and one-on-one training that can be delivered over the course of a day or in one-hour chunks. We create scenarios for participants that are recorded and critiqued in real time. We are in the business of helping to prepare for and then manage a crisis. Rockford Gray’s solution to crisis response is four fold: 1. Create or update an actionable Crisis Plan. 2. Train the crisis team on how to execute on that plan through simulation exercises. 3. Provide real-time counsel to clients during crises. 4. Evaluate effectiveness, revise the plan and train again to keep everyone current. For presentation skills training we start by delivering Rockford Gray’s 12 Steps to Better Presentations. And then through videotaping simulated performances by our subject, we are able to identify strengths and weaknesses in the participant’s communication style. From this baseline, we then pinpoint positive communication behaviors that need to be converted into effective communication habits. Rockford Gray is also in the business of providing both strategic direction and media relations counsel either for short-term engagements, or over the length of a campaign. In Summary, our goal in strategic communications consulting is to minimize the client’s time investment and create an efficient communications process that achieves measurable outcomes.

business: PICMG - PCI Industrial Computer Manufacturers Group
description: PICMG is a not-for-profit 501(c) consortium of companies and organizations that collaboratively develop open standards for high performance industrial, military/aerospace, telecommunications, test/measurement, medical, and general purpose embedded computing applications. There are over 150 member companies that specialize in a wide range of technical disciplines, including mechanical and thermal design, single board computer design, very high speed signaling design and analysis, networking expertise, backplane and packaging design, power management, High Availability software, and comprehensive system management. Founded in 1994, PICMG’s original mission was to extend the PCI standard to non-desktop applications. The formal name of the organization is the PCI Industrial Computer Manufacturers Group. Key specifications standards developed under the PICMG consortium include: - COM Express® - COM-HPC® - MicroTCA®, AdvancedMC®, and AdvancedTCA® - ModBlox7 - CompactPCI® and CompactPCI®Serial - InterEdge - SHB Express - HPM (Hardware Platform Management) You can find short form documents of the specifications on our website, as well as links to download the full documents.

There are billions of billions of organisms that are currently deployed on the planet Earth. All of them came into existence by the process known as biological evolution and all of them are constantly preforming certain information processing or computational tasks. For all practical purposes these organisms can be considered as computers, but what is exactly their architecture? Do they have the classical von Neumann architecture or is there something else that we can identify and, perhaps, use for developing better computers? Do they use quantum effects or quantum computation, or all such effects are irrelevant for computations performed on the macroscopic scales of individual organisms? In Artificial Neural Computing we are developing a new bio-inspired computer by employing the latest advances in physics, biology and machine learning.

Coginiti is the Semantic Intelligence Platform that helps data teams build, govern, and operationalize trusted business logic across every data platform — so AI agents and humans make decisions from the same source of truth. Most organizations struggle to move AI from pilot to production. The bottleneck isn't model quality — it's data quality, fragmented definitions, and ungoverned business logic scattered across tools, teams, and platforms. Coginiti solves this by unifying the full lifecycle of business meaning: from development and testing through semantic definition, governance, and enterprise-wide consumption. The platform includes two purpose-built AI agents: Coginiti Smith helps data teams define and govern the universal semantic graph — standardizing metrics, authoring transformations, and encoding business context. Coginiti Guide enables business users and AI applications to query governed data in natural language, operating within the semantic contract Smith defines. Core capabilities: 21+ native data platform connections, CoginitiScript for modular analytics, a shared catalog with version control and code review, data lineage, agent observability, enterprise API access (JDBC/ODBC, REST), and native orchestration. What makes Coginiti different: Unlike tools that start at metric definitions and work outward, Coginiti was built from data operations upward. The semantic layer is the capstone of a comprehensive DataOps workflow — not a standalone product. Every metric traces back to the development, testing, and review that produced it. Coginiti connects to 21+ platforms including Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Oracle, SQL Server, and legacy systems. It deploys in cloud, hybrid, on-prem, and air-gapped environments with IL2-IL6 security and Zero Trust architecture. 300+ organizations across government, defense, healthcare, financial services, and retail trust Coginiti to operationalize the meaning of their data.

CCR is a global non-profit organization dedicated to making education more relevant by answering the question: Why, What, and How should students learn for an age of A.I.? CCR brings together international organizations, jurisdictions, academic institutions, corporations, non-profit organizations, and foundations. Understanding the “Why” and reshaping the “What” and “How” of Education is ever-more critical in the context of economic and social justice/equity issues, which are being amplified by new technologies (AI, Biotech etc.) and planetary-wide problems (global warming, pandemic, etc.). The last major changes to the historical curriculum took effect in the late 1800’s as a response to the sudden growth in societal and human capital needs. As the world of the 21st century bears little resemblance to that of the 19th century, education curricula need to be deeply redesigned for the four dimensions of (modernized) Knowledge, Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning. Adapting to 21st century needs means revisiting each dimension and the interplay between them and modern pedagogy. CCR’s leading role in deep, synthesized, and applied research and product development is more timely than ever. CCR thus offers thought leadership (books, papers), and designs: * Standards/Curricula in partnership with jurisdictions, foundations, and school systems (Mathematics, World History, World Literature, Chemistry, Psychology, Sociology, etc.) * Courseware (Mathematics, Computer Science, AI, Cleantech, Nanotech, etc.) * Professional Development for Skills, Character, and Meta-Learning * Pedagogical and technology tools (Projects Portal, etc.) For more info, contact us at info@curriculumredesign.org

Some key advantages of Deos are: • DO-178 Certification Artifact Reuse Through Software Modularity (leveraging certification credit from prior certifications) • Industry Leading SafeMC™ Technology for Safety Critical Systems on Multicore Processors • Time & Space Partitioning (allows mixed levels of criticality running on the same device) • Extensive Certification Pedigree (Certified to DAL A Since 1998) • Patented Slack Scheduling Technology (allows for full processor utilization) • Scalable from Simple LRUs to Complex IMA Systems • ARINC-653, Priority Preemptive, and/or Rate Monotonic Scheduling Available • Industry Standard Application Programming Interfaces (API’s) ARINC-653 & POSIX

We knew AI could help streamline that complexity—making things safer, faster, and more efficient. It’s a win for the plants, and for the future of clean energy.” Jerrold Vincent, our CFO and co-founder, adds: “Back in 2016, we recognized the potential for AI to support nuclear—not just in cutting costs, but in preparing the next generation of workers. Our products include: • AUDIBLEHEALTH AI is a Clinical Decision Support Software solution designed to screen for and detect respiratory diseases in the intricate patterns found in the sound of a human cough. Users cough for approximately 10 seconds into the AudibleHealth app, and a result is returned in around 30 seconds. At present the solution supports detection for Tuberculosis, COVID-19, Pneumonia, and Smoker status with another 15+ solutions in development. Future indications on the product roadmap include Measles, RSV, Influenza, Pertussis, Lung Cancer, and many more. • FCV SENTINEL is a threat-agnostic early warning system, based on RAIsonance’s proprietary cough analysis technology. This tool is designed to detect subtle changes that may be the result of exposure to a pathogen, chemical agent, or environmental toxin experienced by the user. For businesses and organizations, aggregate data is presented on interactive dashboards in near real time, and can be customized to track readiness by group, location, region, etc. • MYADVOCATE is designed to support those with chronic respiratory conditions such as COPD and asthma. The solution creates an in-depth, completely unique profile for each user, and then monitors even very small changes that indicate a problem with their respiratory health. MyAdvocate provides a fast, biometric, early-warning signal of a potential respiratory health issue. Overview: AccutarBio employs artificial intelligence to revolutionize drug discovery. With capabilities in side chain flexible mode ligand docking, virtual screening, and drug ADME property prediction, Accutar’s platform beats the industry standard in computation-aided drug design. The company’s hybrid based approach, which uses computational drug design followed by wet lab validation, greatly reduces the time and cost necessary for traditional drug discovery efforts. Accutar is committed to building strong partnerships, and collaborates across academia and the pharmaceutical industry to solve interdisciplinary problems. The company was founded in 2015 and has locations in both Shanghai, China and New York, NY. Products & Services: Accutar offers two software packages: Chemi-Net and Orbital. Chemi-Net is a molecular graph convolutional network for accurate drug property prediction. It was recently shown to improve the accuracy of ADME property prediction by a large margin in comparison to the widely-used methods https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.06236. Orbital is a deep neural network based docking platform. The prediction accuracy of protein-ligand complex (holo) from ligand free state (apo) structure is significantly higher than current standards. In addition to these tools, AccutarBio offers services in virtual screening for lead discovery; intelligent-SAR for lead optimization and drug property prediction.
